asr_es: Muchas gracias, señor diputado. Estudiaremos su advertencia y se tomarán las medidas oportunas en su caso. Pasamos al siguiente punto del orden del día. Se trata del debate conjunto sobre el informe del Consejo Europeo y la declaración de la Comisión Consejos Europeos de los días 17, 18 y 29 de junio del 2004 y la declaración del Consejo Semestre de Actividad de la Presidencia irlandesa. A tales efectos, tiene en primer lugar la palabra el presidente del Consejo durante la presidencia semestre irlandés, el señor Agen, y tiene la palabra por 20 minutos.
hypothesis_en: I would like to thank the President-in-Office of the Council for his reply, and I would like to thank the President-in-Office of the Council for his reply, and I would also like to thank the President-in-Office of the Council for his reply, and I would also like to thank the President-in-Office of the Council for his reply, and I would also like to thank the President-in-Office of the Council for his reply.
reference_en: thank you very much yes Honourable Member we shall be looking into that and appropriate measures will be taken where appropriate ((Chairman starts speaking)) pasamos al siguiente punto del ((Chairman stops speaking)) the next item on the agenda is joint debate (1.27) on the European Council report and the Commission statement on the European Councils of the seventeenth and= seventeenth and eighteenth and the twenty-ninth of June two thousand and four and the Council statement on the work of the Irish Presidency (2.38) so first of all let me give the floor to the Mr Ahern to ~Teesutch for twenty minutes
